description_long: This is a tall, narrow metal locker commonly found in urban environments such as gyms, schools, or workplaces. The locker is painted a muted gray and stands on four short black legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The front features two vertical doors with ventilation slits and a small label holder, one of which is open to reveal the interior. Inside, there is a hanging rod with a white shirt and a blue shoebox, and the inside of the door is decorated with stickers and photos. The locker is constructed primarily from sheet metal, with visible hinges and a handle for opening the door. Its utilitarian design and robust build make it suitable for securely storing personal belongings in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A tall, gray metal locker with two doors, ventilation slits, and black legs, containing a shirt and shoebox inside. The open door displays stickers and photos, highlighting its use for personal storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the locker with one door open, revealing a hanging shirt, shoebox, and interior details.
description_view_1: Side view with the door partially open, showing the locker’s depth and the thickness of the metal construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel of the locker.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the open door, showing stickers and photos attached to the inside of the door.
